About Us

Builders Who
Know Cabinets

We are a locally owned Tri-Cities team with over 20 years in the cabinet industry. Unlike showroom-only studios, we are builders first — which means we understand how kitchens are actually constructed, not just how they look in a catalog.

We guide homeowners through complex kitchen remodels from start to finish, making the process clear, structured, and stress-free — from planning to final install.

⚒
Builder-Led Design
Every layout is designed with real construction knowledge — no surprises during install.
◈
Honest Pricing
Transparent quotes from day one. What we quote is what you pay.
◉
Full-Service Support
From material selection to final installation — one team handles everything.
20+Years of Craft
What We Do

Our Services

From full kitchen remodels to custom cabinet design, we deliver end-to-end solutions tailored to your space, style, and budget.

01
Kitchen Cabinet Design
Custom layouts designed around your space and lifestyle, from door style to hardware selection.
02
Cabinet Installation
Precision installation by experienced builders. Clean, level, and built to last every time.
03
Countertops & Stone
Quartz, granite, and stone countertops sourced and installed to complement your design.
04
Full Kitchen Remodel
Complete transformations — cabinetry, countertops, backsplash, flooring. One team, one contract.
05
Backsplash & Tile
From subway tile to herringbone — we source and install tile that elevates your space.
06
Flooring
Luxury vinyl plank, hardwood, and tile flooring options to complete your kitchen.

How It Works

Our Process

A clear, structured approach so you always know what to expect — from the first conversation to the final install.

1
Consultation
We discuss your vision, space, and budget. No pressure, just honest conversation.
2
Design & Quote
Custom layout with transparent pricing. You see exactly what you're getting.
3
Production
Materials ordered and cabinets prepared to your exact specifications.
4
Installation
Our team handles every detail. Clean, precise, and on schedule.
